metaTitle: Cold Rooms For Sale Los Angeles, CA | Beverage Equipment Traders
metaDescription: New and used cold rooms shipping to Los Angeles, California. Walk-in coolers, cold rooms, and cold boxes for temperature-controlled storage in brewing and bevera. Ships from San Marcos, CA. Rigging and installation available.
h1: Cold Rooms For Sale — Los Angeles, CA
heroBody: Beverage Equipment Traders ships new and used cold rooms to Los Angeles and nationwide from our 40,000 sq ft facility in San Marcos, CA. Every piece photographed, documented, and priced. Rigging and installation available at destination.
bodyHeading: Cold Rooms Shipping to Los Angeles — What to Know
locationParagraph: For Los Angeles area buyers, in-person inspection of equipment at our San Marcos facility is available by appointment. Local rigging and installation jobs typically turn around within 1 to 2 weeks.
marketParagraph: Beverage Equipment Traders ships to all 50 states and serves buyers across North America. The Los Angeles market is one of many active markets we work in — contact us regardless of your location and we will advise on current inventory and freight timing.
sidebarHeading: Ship Cold Rooms to Los Angeles
sidebarBody: Our trade desk responds within one business day. Provide your requirements and we will return current inventory and a freight quote to Los Angeles.
inventoryHeading: Featured Cold Rooms — Ships to Los Angeles
faqHeading: Cold Rooms Los Angeles — Frequently Asked Questions
finalCtaHeading: Sourcing Cold Rooms in Los Angeles?
finalCtaBody: We ship from San Marcos, CA. Every piece photographed and condition-documented. Rigging and installation available in Los Angeles and nationwide.
